intents.text: Find a random repository to test a random programming language.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: find a random repo to test a random language

intents.text: Use a local Rust repo instead of a random one for testing.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: we have a rust repo locally somewhere, test that

intents.text: What about all the other tools available — are they being used?
intents.verbatim_excerpt: what about all the other tools?

intents.text: Do we track the quality of each language implementation?
intents.verbatim_excerpt: do we track the quality of each language implementation

intents.text: Is quality tracking included in the scan?
intents.verbatim_excerpt: is that included in the scan?

intents.text: Is the current implementation beautiful or well-designed?
How difficult would it be to have deeper language implementations?
intents.verbatim_excerpt: how hard would it be for us to have more deep implementations

intents.text: Is there a Python package that provides all that functionality?
intents.verbatim_excerpt: Is there a python package that does all that stuff?

intents.text: Please integrate that Python package and identify other functions we still need to implement.
intents.verbatim_excerpt: Yes please, and what about all the other functions? Any stuff for us to implement?
